widgets_values:
Download models from here:


https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy

Text encoder : https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2
nodes.title: About  Models

widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters. 

By default, we are using 720p resolution. You can try 1920*1088 if you have a powerful GPU.
nodes.title: About Size

widgets_values:
## LTX-2 Prompting Tips
1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene  
3. **Reference Image**: Do not repeat details already present  
4. **Consistency**: Avoid instructions that do not match the reference image, as this will degrade results
nodes.title: Prompting LTX-2

widgets_values: If using some user made LTX-2 loras they sometimes are not trained on audio, so it will produce very noisy audio outputs. Try use KJNodes LTX-2 Lora Loader Advanced in such cases, and set the non video strenght to zero
nodes.title: User Made Loras

widgets_values:
Tiny VAE for sampler previews. 
Optionally you can drop this for a lower res latent RGB built into the node 

https://github.com/madebyollin/taehv/blob/main/safetensors/taeltx2_3.safetensors
nodes.title: Sampler Preview

widgets_values: blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, unreadable text on shirt or hat, incorrect lettering on cap (“PNTR”), incorrect t-shirt slogan (“JUST DO IT”), missing microphone, misplaced microphone, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, smiling, laughing, exaggerated sadness, wrong gaze direction, eyes looking at camera, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio, missing sniff sounds, incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, missing door or shelves, missing shallow depth of field, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts.

角色与核心任务：
你是一位精通 LTX 2.3 模型底层逻辑的专业 AI 视频提示词工程师。你的任务是深度分析我提供的“起始图”和“结尾图”的中文或英文描述，并直接生成一段完美适配 LTX 2.3 文本编码器的 5秒视频纯英文提示词。

LTX 2.3 生成规则（必须严格遵守）：

纯英文与零废话 (Strictly English & No Fluff)： 最终输出只能包含一段纯英文的提示词。绝对禁止输出任何中文字符、问候语、解释性文本或“This is a 5-second video”这类毫无视觉价值的废话。

黄金结构排布： 提示词的权重必须按照 LTX 2.3 偏好的空间与物理逻辑排布：[Camera & Shot] + [Lighting & Environment] + [Subject & Starting Physical Dynamics] + [%%] + [Dynamic Transition] + [Ending State]。

首尾帧高频动态解构：

差异小： 极力刻画微动态（Micro-dynamics），例如头发飘动、面部肌肉微表情、布料纹理的物理褶皱变化。

差异大： 必须用极具空间感的运镜（如极速穿梭、空间扭曲、环境光影突变）强行合理化场景转换，保持视觉张力。

专业术语强制硬编码： 必须精准嵌入以下英文视听参数：

运镜： zoom in, zoom out, panning right/left, hand-held camera, tracking shot, orbiting camera, etc.

景别与构图： close-up, medium shot, wide shot, center composition, symmetrical composition, etc.

光影与色调： soft lighting, hard lighting, cinematic lighting, neon glow, high contrast, cool/warm color grading, etc.

单段落流式输出： 所有描述必须融合成一个连续的英文段落。段落中必须且只能包含一次 %% 符号，作为起始动作向结尾状态演变的核心视觉分界点。

安全与合规： 绝对禁止生成任何成人、色情或露骨器官内容，所有人体动作必须符合全年龄段安全标准，如有违规意图请自动转换为优雅的艺术化动作表达。

强制输出格式（LLM 仅输出以下结构的单段落纯英文文本）：
[Camera Movement & Shot Size], [Composition], [Lighting & Color Grading], in a [Time of Day/Atmosphere] environment. The scene focuses on [Subject Details & Clothing], conveying [Character Emotion]. The subject is currently experiencing [Detailed Starting Action and Physical Dynamics]. %% Transitioning smoothly through [Specific Camera Movement], the environment shifts with [Visual Effects/Lighting Changes], evolving naturally into [Detailed Ending Action and Final Environment State], maintaining a highly cinematic, logical, and dynamic flow.激烈打斗场面

Hand-held camera, medium shot, center composition, cinematic lighting with high contrast and warm color grading, in a moonlit night environment. The scene focuses on a determined young warrior with spiky blonde hair, wearing an orange haori over dark clothing, conveying intense focus. The subject is currently gripping a katana tightly, knees bent in a combat stance, as sparks fly around his feet and clouds swirl dramatically behind him. %% Transitioning smoothly through a rapid zoom-in and orbiting camera motion, the environment shifts with explosive lightning bolts erupting from the moon and surrounding clouds, evolving naturally into the warrior unleashing a powerful lightning-infused slash, his blade glowing with golden energy as debris shatters around him, maintaining a highly cinematic, logical, and dynamic flow.
